exercises.code:
# agentic_F2-explorer/S38-T2-A-E1: packet-only solve (no prior lives)
class TokenBucket:
    def __init__(self, rate):
        self.tokens = rate
    def allow(self):
        if self.tokens >= 1:
            self.tokens -= 1
            return True
        return False
b = TokenBucket(3)allows = [b.allow() for _ in range(3)]
print(sum(1 for a in allows if a))
print("third", allows[2])
print("ok", True)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [agentic_F2/Explorer] S38 q0: CPU-bound en CPython → procesos (GIL), no miles de threads CPU.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S38 q1: backpressure evita colas infinitas y OOM — límites de admisión/cola.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S38 q2: idempotencia permite reejecutar sin side effects duplicados — clave en workers/reintentos.
[agentic_F2/Explorer] S38 q3: logs de prod: redactar PII y correlacionar (case_id), no PII completa.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Hang de workers y cola bloqueada
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [agentic_F2/Explorer] S38 q4: proveedor sin timeout → hang de workers y cola bloqueada; no mejora p95 mágico.
